description_long: This object is a large, pyramid-shaped stack of red aluminum soda cans, each featuring a white label with the word 'cola' in bold, blocky letters. The cans are arranged in a symmetrical, tiered formation, with each layer containing fewer cans as it ascends, culminating in a single can at the top. The cans have a glossy finish, with silver tops and standard pull tabs visible on the uppermost layer. The labels are uniformly wrapped around each can, and the design is consistent across all visible surfaces. There are no visible signs of rust, dents, or damage on any of the cans, and the stack appears stable and neatly organized. The overall appearance suggests a promotional or display arrangement, rather than random street litter.
description: A neatly stacked pyramid of red aluminum cola cans with white labels and silver tops, arranged in a symmetrical display. The cans are undamaged and feature bold 'cola' branding.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full pyramid of red cola cans, with the 'cola' label clearly visible on each can.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view revealing the right side of the can pyramid, maintaining the clear visibility of the labels and the uniform stacking.
description_view_2: Rear view of the pyramid, with the same symmetrical arrangement and label visibility as the front.
description_view_3: Left side view of the can pyramid, showing the same tiered structure and consistent branding.
attribute_brand_logo: A white, blocky 'cola' logo in lowercase letters, repeated on each can's red label.
